title: CH UMZH Connect
introduction: FHIR Implementation Guide for the UMZH-connect project extending Swiss standards (CH Core, CH eTOC) with an API framework based on the international Clinical Order Workflow (COW) for common b2b transactions between healthcare providers
registry-description: FHIR Implementation Guide for the UMZH-connect project extending Swiss standards (CH Core, CH eTOC) with an API framework based on the international Clinical Order Workflow (COW) for common b2b transactions between healthcare providers
